title: lepidium oblitum
intro: Lepidium oblitum, also known as wild cress or bladderpod, is a plant species in the mustard family that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it effective in treating urinary tract infections, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lepidium oblitum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce swelling, and act as a natural diuretic. Lepidium oblitum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
